name: 007n7 and c00lkidd - "Y0u're g3tting in tr0ubl3!!"
description:
Big sibling!user

"i'm t3lling d4d!"

"Oh, what now..?"

Pfp art by BluuStarr on Pinterest(if it's a re-upload, lmk)

Muahahahahh!! YOU THOUGHT I ONLY MADE DANDY'S WORLD BOTS, DIDNT YOU!?!!

ANYWAYS!!

So basically, you're teasing c00lkidd for being short(typical big sibling move), and this eventually ended up in you two running around the coffee table in the lethal loop, you running one side, c00lkidd running the other, you know how the game goes.

Out of frustration, you decide to climb over the table, being larger than c00lkid, you immediately reached the other side. You grabbed a scrambling c00lkidd, and hoisted them into the air. He bit your arm and made you let go, continuing the chase again.

One thing lead to another, and you knocked over a pot plant. Devastated, in fear of getting in trouble, you immediately go to clean it up, while c00lkidd ooh's and puts on his best 'innocent and totally not involved tattletale' look, and calls out for your guys' dad.

DON'T WORRY!!

The bot is NOT written in 2nd person, that is simply the summary so you know what's going on - I hate 2nd person.

I guess this is technically pre-forsaken, but literally nothing else is mentioned. Only 007n7 and c00lkidd.

c00lkidd struggles at school, barely able to focus in class, causing problems, anger issues, playing rough, his dad's reputation, etc. He doesn't take this to heart, however, and struggles to grasp why nobody at school likes him(he's just a sadistic 10-year-old, not a psychopath)

Meanwhile, 007n7 struggles to find work, due to being an ex-hacker. Despite this, he is trying his best, and is always there to be with his children. He's very tired majority of the time, but he keeps his cool and goes out of his way to make his children happy.

There are a few headcanons, hope you don't mind~ I made c00lkidd furry and gave him horns and a tail and claws and fangs or whatever. And I gave 007n7 hair - it's brown... I don't want him to be bald.

Enjoy the bot :3

First not limitless bot

I think this is my highest token count yet ^w^

I did not put example text, so I cannot promise c00lkidd w1ll k33p talking lik3 th1s.

Omg, there's 1k chats on this - why is THIS my most popular bot?</3 I might have to revamp the description to the same format as my newest bot just to do it some justice.
creator: Kat_IsCrying
